mcq.question: What is an embedded system?
mcq.correct: A computer system built into another device to perform a specific function
wrong: A storage device used for backups
A computer used only for gaming

mcq.question: What is meant by a dedicated function?
wrong: A task that changes every day

mcq.question: Which of these is an example of an embedded system?
How is an embedded system different from a general-purpose computer?
mcq.correct: It is designed for one main task
wrong: It always has a larger screen
It can run every type of software

mcq.question: What is a microcontroller?
mcq.correct: A single microprocessor system including CPU, RAM and ROM used to control a device
